meaning: n.剥树皮工,剥皮机,发出似狗吠的人,杂耍、戏院前叫喊招揽观众的人
examples: Barker wound up spending 140 days in Haiti last year.
Barker shipped the first Sunspring to an orphanage in India.
Whatever Messers Corbett and Barker may claim, there was only one Ronnie.
They might have to bring in Bob Barker to give some of these houses away.
Why, since, as Mr Barker shows, there is a perfectly good model already in existence?
